name: The Maskability Index: Predicting Task-Objective Alignment in Pretrained Language Models

description: arXiv:2607.20265v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large-scale pretrained language models such as T5 and BERT have demonstrated strong capabilities for generating structured knowledge. However, their performance depends on how closely the prompting strategy matches the objectives used during pretraining. We introduce the Maskability Index (MI), a quantitative metric that estimates whether a know...
author: Ahmad Pouramini, Mahsa Afsharzadeh
